community.name: Local Police Department
community.description:
Welcome the LPD, one of VRChats oldest and largest roleplaying groups bringing entertainment to public lobbies since 2018. The LPD hosts daily VRChat events where officers are assigned to a squad to create roleplay scenarios in public lobbies, themed around interactions with the public and emergency services. Due to the nature of improv, anything can happen during these events. From drug busts and shootouts, to checking mirror dwelling licenses. 

To join the LPD check out the recruitment channel on our Discord at <color=#7289daff>discord.gg/lpd</color>. There you will find the application form as well as our handbook which is packed with all kinds of important information. Once accepted you will go through cadet training, before jumping into patrolling VRChat as an official LPD officer. When you have some experience under your belt you can take additional training to move up the ranks or specialize into other kinds of roleplay that we offer.

Patrol officers will arrest people and bring them to the LPD station to take their mugshot that then gets posted on our discord server for everyone to see. If they choose to not come quietly we have our swat team, known as SLRT, to help persuade them. Once the suspect has been processed they will be handed over to our Corrections Officers and given a nice new home in the LPD Prison with all the other prisoners. And if anyone gets hurt in the process they can be treated by the LMT at our Hospital. To find out how you can help keep the streets of VRChat safe, join our Discord or follow us on Twitter @LPD_vr.

community.name: Wolveeps Fan Club
community.description: Wolveeps Fan club is fun inspirational community around Wovleeps creatives works and content․ We hold events‚ hangouts‚ and meetups․

community.name: floofballvr
community.description: Floofy Gaming and Chill is inclusive 18+ social community! We play games and chill here! Also we are dedicated to make meaningful connections, empower creativity and create memories together! Our goal is provide engaging, welcoming experience for both new and experienced members in the community! This community is a safe space for adults! Our staff welcome our newcomers, make introductions, help people connect, and we make sure nobody feels left out or feel lost! You're seen and definitely included from day one!

community.name: WaterWolf
community.description: WaterWolf: WaterWolf is a community focused on building, exploring, and promoting immersive and enjoyable worlds through creating amazing assets, tools, technologies, avatars, and worlds and hosting some of the best events. The community offers a great opportunity to make new friends, explore and learn new skills, and make amazing memories together.

community.name: Noved Squad
community.description:
Welcome to the Noved Squadǃ 

Home of the Noved Notes Podcastǃ
A VRChat Podcast that goes into the amazing creators of VRChatǃ

In the Noved Squad Community‚ we do a bunch of hangouts‚ game nights‚ DJ Noved Party Nights‚ and collaborate to make amazing creations on VRChatǃ Overall we just like to have funǃ

We also hold the annual Squad Forever Fest Charity Event in support of the International Association for Suicide Prevention! Learn more at my booth!

community.name: Safe Haven of Crystarium
community.description: "Safe Haven of Crystarium"  is where we make new friends, Playing some games "Terrors of nowhere, Slash Co or Memena's Lord Arena" (Pc only world). We welcome anyone to join our group. We also do charity events (The Trevor Project/ St Jude's Children Hospital) in June/December.

community.name: CozyCon Online
community.description: CozyCon is a free yearly multi-fandom virtual convention on Discord/VRChat/Twitch that runs in September, but also hosts monthly events. We have skilled vendors, DJs and Panelists every year, sweet themed merch designed by our artists, and year-round community space to chat, organize games, share your creative works and much more.

community.name: Community Oasis
community.description:
hey i'm. emil from EH3DSutdio I make furniture and 3D models for Worlds,
I also have a group called eh community oasis where we help people learn blender and unity.

community.name: Pawlygon
community.description:
Pawlygon Studio creates premium face tracking addons, clothing assets, textures, VRChat accessories, and creator tools for the VR and furry communities.

Our goal is to help avatars feel more expressive, polished, and fun to use in VRChat. We create face tracking setups for popular avatars, clothing and texture assets, along with Unity and Blender tools designed to make avatar setup easier for both users and creators.

At our booth, you can:
 • Explore our latest face tracking addons
 • Check out clothing assets, textures, and VRChat accessories
 • Join our community and follow future releases

Links:
 • Booth.pm (https://pawlygon.booth.pm/)
 • Gumroad (https://pawlygon.gumroad.com/)
 • Jinxxy (https://jinxxy.com/Pawlygon)

community.name: Metaverse Degen
community.description:
We are a podcast network Right here in VRChat! we started with our interview show showcasing and interviewing various people, creators and communities here on the platform to now adding two actual play ttrpg podcast on our roster! join us why we share our stories or others! 

Shows:
• Metaverse Degen Podcast
• Hold My Ale (Actual Play D&D in VR)
• Dead on Arrival (Actual Play Cyberpunk Red in VR)

community.name: 1st Weimar Republic
community.description:
Welcome to the 1st Weimar Republic!

We’re an alternate history VRChat roleplay group based around 1920's Interwar Germany.

We host weekly immersive RP events in the Weimar Republic;
Daily Life of Soldiers
Combat RP
Military Training
Ceremonies

From fighting in the street and countryside against uprisings to simply living out the daily life of a soldier, our events tell an ongoing narrative influenced by all of our members. Want to know more? If Immersive RP, Alt-History or History, and an interesting story appeal to you, then the 1st Weimar Republic is the place for you!

https://discord.gg/ZMP49H3zSY

Join now, become part of our growing community, and leave your mark upon the Republic!

community.name: The Bakery
community.description: Demonhead/The Bakery is a group of artists that primarily focus on digital art, 3d animation, and virtual reality environments, primarily based in VRChat. We enjoy creating stories with our art, and giving people something to enjoy!

community.name: Meia
community.description: Group for Meia's avatar edits and creationsǃ

community.name: MapleMoose
community.description: MapleMoose, also known as Scout, is an creative body from Canada who tends to do many different arts. Mostly in the forms of 3D and 2D digital arts. Come by the booth to see what he could do for you!!

community.name: Wolfie's Hangout
community.description: A safe place for furries and non furries alike

community.name: VRelium
community.description:
VRelium is a dynamic and inclusive community within VRChat‚ built around a shared passion for music and creativity․ We are dedicated to supporting and showcasing the talents of virtual artists‚ DJs‚ and performers‚ providing a platform for them to connect with audiences and share their craft in meaningful ways.

At the heart of VRelium is the belief that music has the power to bring people together‚ and we aim to create unforgettable experiences that inspire connection and collaboration․ Through our events‚ we celebrate the diverse and ever-evolving virtual music scene‚ from intimate performances to large-scale festivals․


Charity is a key part of what we do‚ as we believe in using our platform to make a positive impact․ By hosting charity-focused festivals‚ we bring the community together to support important causes and demonstrate the potential of VR to create real-world change․


VRelium is more than just a place for music, its a space for building friendships‚ exploring creativity‚ and shaping the future of VR entertainment․ 

Whether youre an artist‚ a performer‚ or someone who simply loves music‚ VRelium is a welcoming space where you can be part of something bigger

community.name: Onix Angel Creations
community.description: A SFW and LGBTQIA＋ community for meeting people‚ making friends‚ creating art and exploring interests

community.name: Rafi77
community.description: Just a small tigerbee that do textures!

community.name: John Coday Creations
community.description: John Coday Creations is a multifaceted studio aiming to tell stories for people to enjoy. With web-comics, animations, video games, live action, and more, we aim to tell the best stories through many different mediums. We hope to share our stories with you!

community.name: Inkblitz
community.description:
I'm the 3D artist behind Inked Creations, providing you thoughtfully created clothes and accessories designed either by myself or one of my artist friends and NEVER by GenAI.  My main focus is to create clothing that doesn't break your performance rank, made with reasonable polygons (Usually under or around 15k for a full clothing set), low material cost, and optimized textures.  All with a slew of features like grabbable hoodies, audiolink, and fun accessories!  

I'm always up to new stuff, check it out at: https://jinxxy.com/Inkblitz/products

community.name: Creative Impressions
community.description:
Creative Impressions is an artistic community aims to bring all of the incredibly talented artists within the VR community together! We aim to create a fun and safe space for artists of all kinds to gather and share their work within our channels and exhibition events, and we hope to inspire anyone and everyone that comes across us.

We offer an array of different artistic channels in our discord server for people to chat and share their works, but we also host a handful of different common events such as R&R and Art studio!
 We plan to host 1 big gallery event a year that will feature many different types of artwork of all different types of media!

community.name: Dragons Forge
community.description: This is a group for people who enjoy our bases and or share our passion in the weirder critters and robots․

community.name: Comrades and Ops
community.description: Comrades And Ops is a gaming and social group which brings people together in the name of fun, good times, and friendship. Our signature event is Thursday Games, a 2-hour gaming session in VRChat held every Thursday at 6pm USA EST. We host and play various games outside of VRChat and encourage participation in major events throughout VRChat and other gaming communities. All members are invited to host their own gaming or social event. Time to rock and roll!

community.name: Kudalyn's Creations
community.description:
Hi! I'm Kuda, and I make customizable furry models for VRChat, along with various clothing and other accessories for them. I also host once a month meetups for my avatar community, so folks can show off what they've been working on, and bring their friends along to chill! 

You can find my storefronts at Jinxxy and Gumroad. If you search 'Kudalyn's Creations' in the Worlds section of VRChat to find my avatar world, with many more public avatars to browse! 

You can also find more info and more links at my website at Kudalyn.com!

community.name: Raujinn's Avatar Workshop
community.description: I make from-scratch original avatars and avatar assets, both for public and for sale.

community.name: RuneFox
community.description:
Hi, I'm RuneFox237 and I create Avatar Assets/Systems. You may know me from the Punchable System that works with the Ragdoll System from VRLabs, or my Posable Vehicle System. You can check out some of the assets I've made on the avatars at my booth.
I've also recently started dabbling in Udon World Development. I've already helped out with systems for a few public worlds out in the wild as well as some private ones. So expect more on that side of things too.

community.name: Voxian
community.description:
Heyo! I'm Voxian, an avatar and asset creator dedicated to making unique avatars for VRChat. For the past seven years, I've teamed up with my wife, TheCatnamedFish, to bring you some of the most unique avatars to hit the market.

We've made two quadruped bases (The AvaTAUR and 4Paw), a Chocobo, a Kangaroo, Half a Protogen, Outfits and Accessories, Gimmic Prefabs, and More!

- Find Us On Jinxxy! -
https://jinxxy.com/Voxian
There you can find much more information about our products, public avatars, video demos, and other things we've released!

- Virtual Limbs Community -
https://discord.gg/limbs
We would have never made it this far without the support of our friends. The Virtual Limbs community is dedicated to those with an interest in unique bodies. Whether it's something that we've made or not, we're always excited to meet and chat with people. Our community runs Social Hangouts, Game Nights, World Explorations, and Much More! You don't have to have an avatar that matches our theme, but don't be surprised if you end up with a few extra legs after hanging out with us.

community.name: Enderia Network
community.description:
At Enderia Network we try our best to create unique ways to give our members a different VRChat experience when compared to all other communities‚ we often do so by publishing our own worlds and avatars‚ and organizing pre-planned‚ full blown events inside of those․
we also have avatars and unlockable areas for our members‚ either paid or free‚ in Enderia Network everyone gets their chance to shine and show their true self without repercussions‚ with hundreds of roles on our discord‚ and we reward activity too․

community.name: Ayame Vamileon
community.description: Hi, I'm a 2D artist who loves meeting new people and helping out wherever I can. If you'd like to see my art, I invite you to check out my social media and my work. I also help out at various events here on VRChat with art and guidance!

community.name: KinxPop
community.description: One collaborative duo teaming up to tackle your ideas! Kinx handles the sketches/lines while Pop does the color/shading. Check our main site https://kinxpop.art/ for examples of our work and our socials!

community.name: DegenTech Inc

community.name: Soaring Fitness
community.description: We are a VR-based workout group, focused on being freely accessible. Our hard working team of Volunteers offer their time and experience to make it all possible. Our Certified Personal Trainers work with our Volunteer Instructors to bring you workouts 7 days a week! We believe good health and fitness should not be gated behind a paywall!

community.name: Corbelle's Music Festivals & Sessions
community.description:
VRChat's Largest Live Music Community

This group is a place to gather all friends‚ fans and wanderers for our massive music festivalsǃ Usually we host an event once a month either under our own banner or for a partnering community․ All shows have free admission and will be Quest-compatible․

For professional musicians ⁄ DJ's who would like to apply for one of the bigger shows throughout the year‚ DM me on Discord for the application process․ The same goes for VRChat or IRL community leaders who want us to cater a festival for your communityǃ

community.name: Furry Hideout
community.description: Here at the 'Hideout we pride ourselves on our relaxed atmosphere‚ and large community of friendly furs and non furs alike‚ we hope you enjoy your stay - and if you like what you see‚ how about joining our discord ? Here you can keep up to date with the latest happenings in world‚ events‚ and much more․ Discord․gg⁄FurryHideout

community.name: ValenVRC
community.description:
Hey there im Valen! I'm a Developer and VRChat mapmaker with 5+ years of experience specializing in the creation of custom scripts and systems, always with performance in mind. I can help you bring your VRChat world ideas to life with custom features tailored to your needs.

Check out my store! I have plenty of assets, both free and paid, that im sure you will find useful if you are into world making!
